title: bathya andina
intro: Bathya andina, also known as Andean mint, is a plant species native to the Andean region, characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Andean mint include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving respiratory issues like coughs and colds, and even helping to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Bathya andina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
